_comment: Baseline metrics for the CI smoke profile (25 clients x 5s, steady_state, mock latency 1ms). Regenerate by running `npm run load:smoke` on a known-good main and copying load-test-results.json's metrics subset. The report (tests/load/lib/report.ts) fails CI if any tracked metric regresses by more than 20% (issue #66, item 5).
